applicability_notes: Elementwise unary activation: log(sigmoid(x)). Registered golden maps 'log_sigmoid' -> torch.nn.functional.logsigmoid. Can fuse as a unary activation epilogue in op chains (e.g. matmul + log_sigmoid) or merge horizontally with other unaries sharing the same input. Supports in-place style output via output_tensor kwarg.

placement_observations.size_descriptor: tile-aligned NHWC/4D shapes from unit tests, values in [-1, 1]
placement_observations.source: unit test (data_gen_with_range default memory config; no explicit memory_config at call site)
unit test (preallocated output_tensor via data_gen_with_range, default placement)
